source.title: PDD Holdings 5-Year Financial History FY2020-9M2025 Revenue Decomposition

extractions.claim: PDD revenue grew 7x from FY2020 to annualized 2025, driven by Temu launch and advertising monetization acceleration

verification.verifier_notes: All revenue figures from official earnings releases. Annualized 2025 is a simple estimate (9M * 4/3).

extractions.claim: Revenue mix shifted dramatically from 81% OMS in FY2020 to ~51% OMS / 49% TS in 9M 2025, driven by Temu's transaction services
extractions.evidence: Revenue mix (OMS / TS / Merchandise): FY2020: 80.6% / 9.7% / 9.7%. FY2021: 77.2% / 15.1% / 7.7%. FY2022: 78.8% / 21.2% / 0% (merchandise discontinued). FY2023: 62.0% / 38.0%. FY2024: 50.3% / 49.7%. 9M 2025: 51.2% / 48.8%. The shift to transaction services correlates with Temu's September 2022 US launch and rapid global expansion.

verification.verifier_notes: Mix percentages computed from reported revenue segments. FY2020-2021 included a third segment (merchandise sales from Duoduo Grocery) that was later reclassified.

extractions.claim: PDD turned profitable in FY2021 and operating profit has grown from RMB 7.0B to RMB 108.4B in four years
extractions.evidence: Operating profit (RMB millions): FY2020: -7,177 (loss). FY2021: 7,039. FY2022: 30,387. FY2023: 60,025. FY2024: 108,423. 9M 2025: 67,904. The inflection to profitability in FY2021 coincided with PDD reducing S&M spending after achieving scale.

verification.verifier_notes: Operating profit from annual earnings releases. FY2020 loss reflects heavy user acquisition spending.

extractions.claim: Temu launched September 2022 and was the primary driver of transaction services revenue explosion from RMB 27.6B (2022) to RMB 195.9B (2024)
extractions.evidence: Transaction services revenue: FY2022: RMB 27,627M. FY2023: RMB 94,099M (+241% YoY). FY2024: RMB 195,902M (+108% YoY). This 7x growth in 2 years directly corresponds to Temu scaling from launch to $30-60B estimated GMV. Temu revenue is captured in transaction services; Pinduoduo revenue is primarily in OMS.

verification.verifier_notes: Revenue from earnings releases. Temu/Pinduoduo attribution is industry consensus (PDD does not formally disclose segment split).
